name: Gold Royalty Corp.
description: Gold Royalty Corp. is a gold-focused royalty company offering creative financing solutions to the metals and mining industry. Its mission is to acquire royalties, streams and similar interests at varying stages of the mine life cycle to build a balanced portfolio offering near, medium and longer-term attractive returns for its investors. The company's diversified portfolio currently includes net smelter return royalties on gold properties located in the Americas, including several world-class assets in stable mining jurisdictions.
